index.description: The index of the date value. Useful when `selectionMode` is `range`.

asChild.description: Use the provided child element as the default rendered element, combining their props and behavior.

index.description: The index of the date value. Useful when `selectionMode` is `range`.

asChild.description: Use the provided child element as the default rendered element, combining their props and behavior.

unstyled.description: Whether to remove the component's style.

colorPalette.description: The color palette of the component

defaultValue.description:
The initial selected date(s) when rendered.
Use when you don't need to control the selected date(s).

onValueChange.description: Function called when the value changes.

defaultPlaceholderValue.description: The initial placeholder date when rendered.

onPlaceholderChange.description: A function called when the placeholder value changes.

onFocusChange.description: A function called when the date input gains or loses focus.

selectionMode.description:
The selection mode of the date input.
- `single` - only one date can be entered
- `range` - a range of dates can be entered (start and end)

min.description: The minimum date that can be selected.

max.description: The maximum date that can be selected.

isDateUnavailable.description:
Returns whether a date is unavailable.
When a committed date matches, the input is marked as invalid.

disabled.description: Whether the date input is disabled.

readOnly.description: Whether the date input is read-only.

required.description: Whether the date input is required

invalid.description: Whether the date input is invalid

name.description: The `name` attribute of the input element.

form.description: The `form` attribute of the hidden input element.

locale.description: The locale (BCP 47 language tag) to use when formatting the date.

createCalendar.description:
A function that creates a calendar object for a given calendar identifier.
Use this to support non-Gregorian calendars (e.g., Persian, Islamic, Buddhist).

granularity.description: Determines the smallest unit that is displayed in the date input.

hourCycle.description:
Whether to use 12-hour or 24-hour time format.
By default, this is determined by the locale.

hideTimeZone.description:
Whether to hide the time zone segment when the value is a `ZonedDateTime`.
Has no effect for values without a time zone.

shouldForceLeadingZeros.description:
Whether to always show leading zeros in month, day, and hour fields.
When false, formatting follows the locale default (e.g. "1" instead of "01").

format.description: The format function for converting a DateValue to a string.

ids.type: Partial<{ root: string; label: (index: number) => string; control: string; segmentGroup: (index: number) => string; hiddenInput: (index: number) => string; }>
ids.description: The ids of the elements in the date input. Useful for composition.
